site.title: NevoFlux
site.description: NevoFlux - The AI-Native Browser. Don't Just Browse. Command.

hero.title: Don't Just Browse. Command.
hero.subtitle: An AI-native browser with identity, memory, and autonomous computer control. Your agentic companion that evolves with you.

features.title: Built for the Age of AI
features.subtitle: NevoFlux embeds AI intelligence directly into the browser engine — not as an extension, but as a core capability.

identity.title: Identity & Soul
identity.description: A personalized AI companion with evolving behavioral patterns. Customize its personality, values, and communication style.

memory.title: Memory & Learning
memory.description: Cross-session encrypted storage with preference adaptation. Your browser learns from every interaction.

autonomy.title: Progressive Autonomy
autonomy.description: Three capability tiers — Chat, Browser, and Agent — giving you control over how much autonomy your AI has.

systemControl.title: Full System Control
systemControl.description: 70+ browser automation APIs plus cross-platform screen capture, mouse and keyboard control. From web pages to your entire OS — AI commands it all.

canvas.title: Canvas Micro Apps
canvas.description: Generate functional mini-applications on the fly. React, Vue, or Svelte — built and running in seconds.

llm.title: Multi-LLM Support
llm.description: 16+ AI providers including Claude, GPT, Qwen, DeepSeek, Gemini, and local models via Ollama.

modes.title: Three Modes. One Browser.
modes.subtitle: Progressive autonomy — you control the level of AI power.

chat.title: Chat
chat.description: Pure conversational AI. Ask questions, get answers, brainstorm ideas — no tools needed.

browser.title: Browser
browser.description: AI controls the browser. Navigate pages, click elements, fill forms, capture screenshots.

agent.title: Agent
agent.description: Full autonomy. File operations, bash commands, computer control, sub-agents, and canvas generation.

cta.title: Ready to Command Your Browser?
cta.subtitle: Open source, privacy-first, and built on Firefox.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
